items.title: Critique-and-revise loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  P[User-style prompt] --> D[Draft response]
  D --> C[Critique against principles]
  C --> R[Revised response]
  R --> F[Preference / training signal]
  F --> M[Updated model behavior]
items.caption: Training-time pattern: draft, critique with constitutional principles, revise, and learn preferences—not necessarily run step-by-step at inference.
